---
title: "DARM: Control-Flow Melding for SIMT Thread Divergence Reduction"
date: 2022-01-01
year: 2022
pdf: "https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/stamp/stamp.jsp?tp=&arnumber=9741285"
venue: "CGO 2022"
code: "https://github.com/charitha22/cgo22ae-darm-code"
slides: "files/slides/cgo2022.pdf"
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2107.05681.pdf"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Charitha Saumya
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
